function checkButtonFlag(){
	if( frm._hidButtonFlag.value == 'update' ){
		frm._btnInsert.style.display	= "none";
		frm._btnUpdate.style.display	= "inline";
		frm._btnInsertCopy.style.display= "none";
	}
}

function openWin(objF,APname,nextAPname,strFlag,winwidth,winheight,para,strSelectedRowData,option){
	
	if(strSelectedRowData!=''){
		var kk = strSelectedRowData.split("(^w^)")[8];
		objF.SelectedRowData.value = kk;
	}
	Submit_openWin(objF,APname,nextAPname,strFlag,winwidth,winheight,'myoption='+option);
	
}

function Submit_openWinN(objF,APname,nextAPname,strFlag,winwidth,winheight,para){
	
	if(event.srcElement.type=='button' && !(event.srcElement.value=='回上層' || event.srcElement.value=='列印' || event.srcElement.value=='排序設定' || event.srcElement.value=='取消')){
		if(!Submit_CheckSubmit(objF)){
			return;
		}
	}
	
	objF.nextAPname.value = nextAPname;
	objF.pushButton.value = event.srcElement.name;
	
	if(event.srcElement.type=='button' || event.srcElement.type=='select-one'){
		objF.pushFun.value=event.srcElement.value;
	}else{
		objF.pushFun.value=event.srcElement.innerText;
	}
	var urlparavvv = ""+
			"pushFun="+objF.pushFun.value+"&"+
			"pushButton="+objF.pushButton.value+"&"+
//			"pushButton=load&"+
			"APname="+APname+"&"+
			"SelectedRowData="+objF.SelectedRowData.value+"&"+
			"nextAPname="+objF.nextAPname.value+
			"";
	strPath = objF.action+"?"+urlparavvv;
	
	//2005/6/15 by Steve
	strPath += "&" + para;
	
	strPath=encodeURI(strPath);
	
	dialogFeatures = "center:yes;" +
					 "dialogHeight=600px;" +
					 "dialogWidth=800px;" +
					 "help:no;" +
					 "status:no";
	
	
	if(strFlag == '1'){
		
		//winwidth = 600; // width of the new window
		//winheight = 600; // height of the new window
		winleft   = 200; // just dummie values
		wintop    = 200; // just dummie values
		
		if(parseInt(navigator.appVersion)>=4){
			winleft	= (screen.width  / 2) - (winwidth  / 2); // center the window right to left
			wintop	= (screen.height / 2) - (winheight / 2); // center the window top to bottom
			// the values get inserted into the features parameter of the window.open command...
		}
		var str = ""+
				"status=yes,toolbar=no,location=no,menubar=no"+
				",resizable=yes,scrollbars=yes,center=yes"+
				",top=" + wintop　+ ",left=" + winleft+
				",height=" + winheight  + ",innerHeight=" + winheight+
				",width=" + winwidth + ",innerWidth=" + winwidth+
				"";
		
		//開啟視窗
		//2008/01/29 vivian 開啟小視窗時,強制focus在小視窗上
		var openWindow = window.open(strPath,null,str);
		openWindow.focus();
		return openWindow;
	}//end of openwin
	
	
	if(strFlag == '2'){
		window.showModelessDialog(strPath,window,dialogFeatures);
	}
	if(strFlag == '3'){
		window.showModelDialog(strPath,window,dialogFeatures);
	}
}
